word: G3627 - οἰκτείρω - oikteírō - oyk-ti'-ro - Have compassion on

sections.paragraph:
- Original: οἰκτείρω

- Transliteration: Oikteiro

- Phonetic: oyk-ti'-ro

- Definition:

1. to pity, have compassion on

- Origin: from oiktos (pity)

- TDNT entry: 5:159,*

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Also in certain tenses οἰκτερέω oiktereō oyk-ter-eh'-o; from οἰκτος oiktos (pity); to exercise pity: - have compassion on.
